_meta.note: Seed data for the Cavril encounter RollTables. CavrilWayfarer.buildDecks() turns each d20 into a native world RollTable in the 'Cavril: Encounters' folder; edit the world tables after creation (or edit this file + rebuild). Entry tag prefix (Hazard/Combat/Skill/Social/Trade) drives automation: Combat-tagged → the themed spawnEncounter; others narrate. Wildcards are trigger-keyed injectors, not a d20 roll.

forest.label: Forest
d20: (Hazard) Spores of the Sleeping Woods: Glowing pollen. DC 13 CON save or fall unconscious for 1d4 hours. (Hag nod)
(Combat) Desperate Poachers: 1d4+1 starving hunters. Trade pelts for 2 Rations, or they attack.
(Skill) Fallen Ancient: Splintered tree maze. DC 13 Athletics/Acrobatics to navigate or take 1d6 piercing.
(Social/Trade) The Lost Druid: Sells Goodberries for 10gp (or seeds/components).
(Combat) Corrupted Treant Sapling: Dripping necrotic sap. Maddened and hostile. (Bleeding Source nod)
(Hazard) Widowmaker Branch: A massive dead branch falls. DC 14 DEX save or 2d6 bludgeoning damage.
(Combat) Giant Spiders: 1d4 spiders drop from the canopy, attempting to web the Forager.
(Skill) Tangled Briar Patch: DC 13 Survival. Failure costs 1 extra Waterskin due to exertion.
(Social/Trade) Rebel Scout: Hiding in a tree blind. Will trade 1 ration for news of Loyalist movements.
(Combat) Owlbear: Protecting a den. Will bluff charge; attacks if the party doesn't back away slowly.
(Hazard) Hag's Snare: Hidden magical tripwire. DC 14 Perception or be hoisted upside down (Disadvantage on next combat).
(Skill) Ancient Elven Shrine: DC 12 Religion to clean it. Success yields a temporary +1 to AC for 24 hours.
(Social/Trade) Weeping Child: A Hag illusion. If approached, it vanishes, leaving behind a rotting wooden toy.
(Combat) Blights: 2d4 Twig Blights masquerading as dry firewood.
(Hazard) Hallucinogenic Fungi: Stepping on them releases gas. DC 12 WIS save or wander blindly into an adjacent hex.
(Skill) Hollow Tree Cache: DC 15 Investigation. Contains 50gp and a stolen Loyalist dagger.
(Combat) Dire Wolf Pack: 1d4+1 wolves tracking the scent of the party's rations.
(Social/Trade) Trapper's Camp: Neutral NPC. Will sell 1d4 Rations for 5gp each.
(Combat) Will-o'-Wisp: Tries to lure the party into a deep ravine.
(Skill) Poison Ivy Thicket: DC 13 Medicine to identify safe path. Failure causes itchy rash (Disadvantage on CHA checks).

grassland.label: Grassland
d20: (Hazard) Hidden Trench: Rebel anti-cavalry trench. DC 14 Perception or fall 10ft.
(Combat) Bounty Hunters: Loyalist patrol demanding to search packs for weapons.
(Skill) Locust Swarm: DC 13 Animal Handling/Survival to protect rations (lose 1d4 on fail).
(Social/Trade) Fleeing Farmers: Trade family ring (50gp) for 3 Waterskins.
(Combat) Scavenging Griffon: Picking at a Loyalist corpse. Territorial.
(Hazard) Wildfire: Dry grass catches spark. DC 13 Athletics to outrun, or take 2d6 fire.
(Combat) Ankheg: Bursts from the dirt beneath the party's feet.
(Skill) Toppled Cart: DC 12 Athletics to lift it. Find 1d4 Rations underneath.
(Social/Trade) Deserter: Begs for civilian clothes in exchange for military intel.
(Combat) Giant Hyenas: 1d4+1 laughing beasts attempting to surround the party.
(Hazard) Sinkhole: Ground gives way to a shallow cave. 1d6 bludgeoning damage.
(Skill) Buried Weapons: DC 15 Investigation spots disturbed earth. Find 3 rusted Loyalist spears.
(Social/Trade) Wandering Minstrel: Sings a song hinting at a local POI for 1gp.
(Combat) Cockatrice: Pecks at the party's ankles. DC 11 CON save vs Petrification.
(Hazard) Flash Flood: Sudden downpour in a gully. DC 13 STR save or be swept 30ft.
(Skill) Lost Sheep: DC 12 Animal Handling to calm it. Can be slaughtered for 4 Rations.
(Combat) Goblins on Wolves: A quick hit-and-run raiding party.
(Social/Trade) Tax Collector: Escorted by 2 guards. Demands a 10gp 'travel toll.'
(Combat) Bulette (Young): A smaller landshark testing its hunting skills.
(Skill) Navigational Landmark: A towering, solitary oak. Advantage on next Navigation check.

swamp.label: Swamp
d20: (Hazard) Quicksand: DC 14 Survival. DC 15 Athletics rescue or burn 1 Rope.
(Combat) Smuggler's Drop: 2 thugs guarding weapons. Bribe (50gp) or fight.
(Skill) Toxic Vapors: DC 12 Nature. Open flames cause 2d6 fire explosion.
(Social/Trade) Mud-Hut Oracle: Trades a Hag Coven clue for 1 Ration.
(Combat) Giant Crocodiles: 1d2 crocs lunging from the murk.
(Hazard) Leech Swarm: Wade through deep water. DC 12 CON save or gain 1 Exhaustion from blood loss.
(Combat) Swamp Hag (Green): Disguised as a trapped maiden. Attacks if touched.
(Skill) Sunken Rowboat: DC 13 Investigation. Yields 1 intact Waterskin and a fishing net.
(Social/Trade) Lizardfolk Hunter: Neutral. Trades 2 Rations of swamp-meat for shiny metal.
(Combat) Shambling Mound: Awakens from what looked like a pile of dead vegetation.
(Hazard) Stinking Mud: Ruins footwear. Disadvantage on Stealth checks until cleaned.
(Skill) Disease Vector: Biting flies. DC 13 Medicine to apply mud-repellent, or be Poisoned for 1 hour.
(Social/Trade) Smuggler's Dead Drop: A floating barrel with a lock. DC 15 Thieves Tools yields 50gp.
(Combat) Bullywugs: 1d4+2 frog-men demanding the party surrender their weapons.
(Hazard) Rotting Log Bridge: DC 12 Acrobatics. Snaps on failure, dropping player into muck.
(Skill) Harvest Lotus: DC 14 Nature. Success yields 1 Swamp Lotus (Gatherer).
(Combat) Water Elemental (Tainted): Formed from the polluted runoff of the war camps.
(Social/Trade) Crazy Hermit: Claims the mud speaks. Actually offers valid directions (Advantage on Navigation).
(Combat) Giant Toads: Attempt to swallow the smallest party member.
(Skill) Identify Tracks: DC 12 Survival. Spot Black Dragon Wyrmling tracks (warns of nearby Arc Node).

hills.label: Hills
d20: (Hazard) Rockslide: DC 13 DEX save or 2d6 bludgeoning + Restrained.
(Skill) Abandoned Mine Cart: DC 13 Tinker's Tools to repair and bypass difficult terrain.
(Combat) Galeb Duhr Sentry: Rebel-awakened boulder. Hates Loyalist armor.
(Social/Trade) Goat Herder: Sells pungent cheese (2 Rations) for war news.
(Combat) Harpy Roost: DC 11 WIS save to resist walking off a cliff.
(Hazard) Scree Slope: Loose gravel. DC 12 Acrobatics or tumble 20ft down.
(Combat) Ogre: Demands the party's pack-beast or largest warrior as a snack.
(Skill) Hidden Cave: DC 15 Perception. Offers a safe, dry place to Long Rest (no random encounters tonight).
(Social/Trade) Prospector: Sells an uncut gem (worth 100gp in a city) for 3 Waterskins.
(Combat) Manticore: Circles above, firing tail spikes at the Forager.
(Hazard) Fog Bank: Dense highland fog. Navigation check made at Disadvantage.
(Skill) Dwarven Ruins: DC 13 History. Deciphering runes reveals a hidden stash of 20gp.
(Social/Trade) Deserter Encampment: 1d4 paranoid soldiers. Will trade stolen armor for food.
(Combat) Cyclops: Throwing boulders at targets practice. The party is the new target.
(Hazard) Steep Incline: Exhausting climb. DC 12 CON save or burn 1 extra Waterskin per player.
(Skill) Identify Ore: DC 14 Nature to spot raw iron veins (worth 10gp to a smith).
(Combat) Hill Giant: Sleeping on the path. DC 14 Stealth to sneak past, or it wakes up hungry.
(Social/Trade) Troll Toll: A troll demands 10gp to cross his hill. Can be negotiated down to 1 Ration.
(Combat) Hobgoblin Patrol: Loyalist mercenaries scanning the high ground.
(Skill) Echo Valley: DC 12 Stealth. Any loud noise triggers an automatic Combat encounter roll.

mountains.label: Mountains
d20: (Hazard) Thin Air: DC 12 CON save or Disadvantage on STR/DEX checks.
(Combat) Frost Giant Scout: Hurls a boulder from a ridge.
(Skill) Ice Bridge: DC 14 Acrobatics or use Pitons/Rope to cross safely.
(Social/Trade) Hermit Monk: Trades hot tea (cures Exhaustion) for a story.
(Combat) Yeti Ambush: Attacks from stealth in heavy snow.
(Hazard) Crevasse: Hidden under snow. DC 14 Perception to spot, or fall 30ft.
(Combat) Wyvern: Swoops down to grab a halfling/gnome/familiar.
(Skill) Frozen Corpse: DC 13 Medicine. Identify they died of poison, not cold. (Holds 15gp).
(Social/Trade) Goliath Tribe: Neutral. Will trade heavy furs (grants cold resistance) for metal weapons.
(Combat) Ice Mephits: 1d4+1 mephits casting Fog Cloud and shattering into ice shards.
(Hazard) Blinding Snowstorm: Movement is halted. Must camp in this hex or risk Exhaustion.
(Skill) Climb the Ice Wall: DC 15 Athletics. Failure means 1d6 falling damage and wasted time.
(Social/Trade) Stranded Cartographer: Trades an accurate map of the adjacent 3 hexes for an escort.
(Combat) Saber-toothed Tiger: Stalking the party for hours before striking.
(Hazard) Avalanche Warning: Loud noises cause snow to shift. Party must communicate purely in whispers.
(Skill) Find Shelter: DC 14 Survival. Success avoids the night's weather hazard.
(Combat) Roc (Distant): Doesn't attack, but the wind from its wings forces a DC 12 STR save to stay standing.
(Social/Trade) Dwarven Patrol: Looking for the striking miners (Hills Arc).
(Combat) Stone Golem: Ancient dormant guardian blocks a narrow pass.
(Skill) Volcanic Vent: DC 13 Nature to use the heat to warm up safely without getting burned.

desert.label: Desert
d20: (Hazard) Glass Sandstorm: Magical glass shards. DC 14 DEX save or 3d6 slashing.
(Skill) Mirage Oasis: DC 15 Insight/Nature to spot the illusion.
(Combat) Dust Mephits: Attempt to slash the party's Waterskins.
(Social/Trade) Nomad Caravan: Sells water for 50gp per Waterskin.
(Combat) Giant Scorpions: 1d4 scorpions burst from the sand.
(Hazard) Scorching Sun: Extreme heat. Burn 1 extra Waterskin per person today.
(Combat) Mummy: Wandering blindly from a ruined tomb.
(Skill) Dune Navigation: Shifting sands. DC 14 Survival to avoid walking in a circle (burns 1 day of Time).
(Social/Trade) Scavenger: Selling a 'treasure map' that is actually a trap.
(Combat) Blue Dragon Wyrmling: Practicing its lightning breath on travelers.
(Hazard) Quicksand (Dry): Sink into aerated sand. DC 13 Athletics to escape.
(Skill) Ancient Obelisk: DC 15 Arcana. Translating it reveals lore about the Plague Lord Arc.
(Social/Trade) Lost Camel: Can be tamed (DC 12 Animal Handling) to carry 10 extra Rations/Water.
(Combat) Air Elemental: A violent dust devil that tries to scatter the party's gear.
(Hazard) Freezing Night: Temperatures drop rapidly. DC 12 CON save or gain 1 Exhaustion if no fire is built.
(Skill) Cactus Tap: DC 13 Survival. Yields 1d4 Waterskins of bitter water.
(Combat) Jackalweres: Disguised as stranded travelers begging for help.
(Social/Trade) Sphinx (Illusion): Asks a riddle. Correct answer grants a temporary blessing (+1 to Saves).
(Combat) Fire Snakes: Slithering through the hot dunes.
(Skill) Buried Ruins: DC 16 Investigation to find an entryway into a forgotten cellar.

jungle.label: Jungle
d20: (Hazard) Razorvines: DC 13 Survival or 1d4 slashing per person.
(Combat) Yuan-Ti Patrol: Hunting for sacrifices for the Ziggurat.
(Skill) Ruined Stele: DC 14 History. Advantage on next Navigation check.
(Social/Trade) Grung Forager: Trades blowgun darts for shiny metal.
(Combat) Insect Swarm: Drops onto the Navigator.
(Hazard) Toxic Spores: Stepping on puffballs. DC 13 CON save or Poisoned for 1d4 hours.
(Combat) Couatl: Testing the party's morality. Attacks only if they act evil.
(Skill) Canopy Climb: DC 14 Athletics to get above the trees for bearing (Reveals adjacent hexes).
(Social/Trade) Explorer's Camp: Abandoned, but has 2 intact Rations and a journal.
(Combat) Giant Ape: Furious territorial display.
(Hazard) Flash Flood: Jungle basin fills rapidly. DC 13 Athletics to climb trees.
(Skill) Identify Poison Dart Frog: DC 12 Nature. Can coat 1 weapon in poison (1d4 extra damage).
(Social/Trade) Tabaxi Hunter: Trades a fresh kill (4 Rations) for a good story.
(Combat) Carnivorous Plant (Mantrap): Grapples and restrains the Forager.
(Hazard) Biting Ants: Ruins Long Rests unless the campsite is properly warded.
(Skill) Vine Swing: DC 13 Acrobatics to cross a deep gorge quickly.
(Combat) Displacer Beast: Hunting in the dense foliage.
(Social/Trade) Mad Botanist: Pays 10gp for any unique plant harvested.
(Combat) Panther Pack: Striking from the branches above.
(Skill) Lost Temple Door: DC 15 Thieves Tools to open an ancient stone puzzle box.

coastal.label: Coastal
d20: (Hazard) Rogue Wave: DC 13 STR save or be swept 30ft into the surf.
(Combat) Sahuagin Raiders: Scavenging a Loyalist shipwreck.
(Skill) Tide Pools: DC 12 Investigation. Yields 1d4 Rations (crabs) or 100gp pearl.
(Social/Trade) Stranded Sailor: Trades treasure map for escort to a city.
(Combat) Blood Hawk Flock: Diving to steal shiny items.
(Hazard) Undertow: Foraging for water requires DC 14 Athletics or player is pulled under.
(Combat) Giant Crab: Defending its tide-pool territory.
(Skill) Message in a Bottle: DC 10 Investigation. A plea for help from the Sunken Emissary (Lake Arc).
(Social/Trade) Lighthouse Keeper: Offers shelter and hot food for 1gp.
(Combat) Sea Hag: Disguised as sea foam, attempts to curse a player.
(Hazard) Jagged Coral: Wading costs 1d4 slashing damage unless moving at Slow Pace.
(Skill) Shipwreck Salvage: DC 14 Athletics to pry open a submerged chest (contains 50gp).
(Social/Trade) Smuggler Skiff: Will sell illegal potions at a discount.
(Combat) Water Weird: Forms from the surf to grab a player.
(Hazard) Salt Spray: Ruins unsealed rations over 24 hours.
(Skill) Whale Carcass: DC 13 Survival to harvest blubber (counts as 5 Rations).
(Combat) Banshee (Drowned Widow): Haunting a rocky bluff.
(Social/Trade) Merfolk Scout: Pops out of the water to warn of Sahuagin nearby.
(Combat) Kelp Golem (Flesh Golem stats): Constructed by a mad sea witch.
(Skill) Climb the Cliffs: DC 14 Athletics to bypass the flooded beach.

urban.label: Urban
d20: (Hazard) Stampeding Crowd: Riot over rations. DC 13 Athletics or take 1d6 bludgeoning.
(Combat) Press Gang: Loyalist thugs attempting forced conscription.
(Skill) Pickpocket: DC 14 Perception to catch an urchin stealing a coin purse.
(Social/Trade) Black Market Fence: Sells poisons/thieves tools at 20% discount.
(Combat) Sewer Grate Ambush: Wererat tries to drag a player below.
(Hazard) Chamber Pot Drop: DC 12 DEX save or be covered in filth (Disadvantage on CHA).
(Combat) Gargoyle: Comes alive from a cathedral roof.
(Skill) Alley Navigation: DC 13 Survival to lose a tail (someone is following you).
(Social/Trade) Town Crier: Announces the Baron's new harsh laws (War Arc clue).
(Combat) Assassins: Hired by the rival faction to eliminate the party.
(Hazard) Collapsed Scaffolding: DC 14 DEX save to dodge falling planks.
(Skill) Identify Forgery: DC 15 Investigation to notice a merchant's coins are fake.
(Social/Trade) Corrupt Guard: Demands a 5gp bribe to let the party enter the market zone.
(Combat) Doppelganger: Impersonating a quest giver to lead the party into a trap.
(Hazard) Plague House: Marked with an 'X'. Passing too close requires a DC 11 CON save.
(Skill) Rooftop Chase: DC 14 Acrobatics to pursue a fleeing thief.
(Combat) Swarm of Cranium Rats: Spying for a local mind flayer/crime boss.
(Social/Trade) Grieving Mother: Elara (from the Hag Arc) begging for updates on the children.
(Combat) Thieves Guild Enforcers: 'You're in our territory.'
(Skill) Eavesdrop: DC 14 Stealth/Perception to overhear military troop movements.

feywild.label: Feywild
d20: (Hazard) Time-Warp Glade: DC 14 INT save. Lose 1d4 Rations to rapid spoilage.
(Skill) Singing Mushrooms: Match the pitch (DC 13 Performance) to open a wall.
(Combat) Redcap Thugs: Demand a toll of fresh blood.
(Social/Trade) Goblin Merchant: Sells 'dreams in bottles' (hallucinations + temp HP).
(Combat) Displacer Beast: Hides in vibrant violet ferns.
(Hazard) Memory Mist: DC 13 WIS save or forget the last 24 hours (party loses map progress).
(Combat) Blink Dogs: Playful but aggressive if their territory is breached.
(Skill) Fairy Ring: DC 15 Arcana to use it as a short-range teleport to an adjacent hex.
(Social/Trade) Satyr Revelers: Offer enchanted wine. Cures exhaustion but makes you hopelessly drunk.
(Combat) Quickling: Steals an item and runs; party must catch it.
(Hazard) Gigantic Flowers: Snap shut like flytraps. DC 14 DEX save.
(Skill) Translate Sylvan: DC 12 History to read a warning sign left by Lord Moth (Hag Arc).
(Social/Trade) Pixie Court: Demands a performance. Success = temporary blessing. Failure = turned pink.
(Combat) Treant (Awakened): Angry that the party stepped on its roots.
(Hazard) Emotion Geyser: Erupts with pure sorrow. DC 13 CHA save or weep uncontrollably for 1 hour.
(Skill) Catch the Sprite: DC 15 Acrobatics to catch a flying messenger carrying stolen intel.
(Combat) Meenlocks: Spawn from the party's fear.
(Social/Trade) Centaur Outpost: Will trade Fey-silver for mortal weapons.
(Combat) Dryad: Charmed wildlife attacks the party for building a fire.
(Skill) Illusionary Bridge: DC 14 Investigation to realize the bridge isn't actually there.

underdark.label: Underdark / Caves
d20: (Hazard) Brimstone Vent: DC 13 CON save or become Poisoned.
(Combat) Piercer Drop: Stalactites attack from the ceiling.
(Skill) Glowing Moss: DC 12 Nature to harvest a chemical light source.
(Social/Trade) Deep Gnome Scavenger: Trades foraging secrets for surface food.
(Combat) Drow Scouting Party: Advance scouts for slaver rings (Slaves Arc).
(Hazard) Cave-In: DC 14 DEX save or take 3d6 bludgeoning.
(Combat) Hook Horror: Clicking sounds echo before it strikes.
(Skill) Navigate the Maze: DC 15 Survival to avoid wandering in circles underground.
(Social/Trade) Myconid Sprout: Offers a telepathic spore-link to communicate silently for 1 hour.
(Combat) Roper: Disguised as a stalagmite, grabs the party from 50ft away.
(Hazard) Slippery Slime: DC 13 Acrobatics to cross a ledge or slide into a chasm.
(Skill) Identify Ore: DC 14 Nature. Spot a vein of Mithril (worth 100gp).
(Social/Trade) Mind Flayer Outcast: Neutral. Offers a magical secret in exchange for a fresh brain.
(Combat) Umber Hulk: Bursts through the solid rock wall, confusing the party.
(Hazard) Dead Magic Zone: All magic items and spells cease functioning in this hex.
(Skill) Bridge the Chasm: DC 14 Athletics to jump or rig a rope across a 20ft gap.
(Combat) Rust Monster: Smells the party's iron rations/armor.
(Social/Trade) Duergar Merchant: Sells invisible ink and poison.
(Combat) Cloaker: Drops from the ceiling to envelop the Scout.
(Skill) Listen to the Echoes: DC 15 Perception. Hear Drow marching (gives warning to hide).

road.label: Road
d20: (Hazard) Washed Out Bridge: Detour or DC 13 Athletics/Tools to rig a crossing.
(Combat) Highwaymen: Deserters demanding food/water toll.
(Skill) Broken Wagon: DC 13 Tools/Athletics to fix. Earns merchant's gratitude.
(Social/Trade) Traveling Peddler: Sells gear and exaggerated war rumors.
(Combat) Loyalist Checkpoint: Heavily armed guards checking papers.
(Hazard) Spike Trap: Left by bandits. DC 14 Perception to spot.
(Combat) Goblin Ambush: Arrows fired from the treeline bordering the road.
(Skill) Identify Cart Tracks: DC 12 Survival. Notice heavy military wagons passed recently.
(Social/Trade) Refugee Caravan: Begging for water. Giving it grants Inspiration.
(Combat) Mercenary Patrol: Looking for a specific rebel leader. Aggressive interrogation.
(Hazard) Fallen Tree Blockade: Deliberately placed. Forcing it clears the road but makes noise.
(Skill) Read the Milestone: DC 10 History. It's been altered to point the wrong way.
(Social/Trade) Wandering Friar: Offers healing (Cure Wounds) for a 10gp donation.
(Combat) Bandit Captain: Challenges the strongest party member to a duel for toll.
(Hazard) Muddy Rut: Cart wheels get stuck. Halves movement speed for the day.
(Skill) Hitch a Ride: DC 15 Charisma to convince a passing merchant to give the party a lift (Double pace, no penalty).
(Combat) Owlbear on the Road: Refuses to yield the right of way.
(Social/Trade) Courier: DC 15 Intimidation/Persuasion to see the sealed letters they carry.
(Combat) Gargoyle Assassin: Disguised as a roadside statue, waits for the target.
(Skill) Find the Toll Bypass: DC 14 Survival to find a smuggler's path around the checkpoint.

river.label: River
d20: (Hazard) Rapids: DC 14 Water Vehicles/Athletics or 2d6 bludgeoning.
(Combat) River Trolls: Attempt to capsize the raft.
(Skill) Snagged Debris: DC 12 Investigation. Find sealed military dispatch.
(Social/Trade) Ferryman: Transports party 1 hex for 10gp per head.
(Combat) Corrupted Water Elemental: Tainted by Druid's sap. Hostile.
(Hazard) Waterfall: Sudden drop. DC 15 Athletics to paddle to shore in time.
(Combat) Giant Constrictor Snake: Drops from an overhanging branch into the boat.
(Skill) Ford the River: DC 13 Athletics to wade across without being swept downstream.
(Social/Trade) Fisherman: Trades 2 Rations (fish) for 1 length of Rope.
(Combat) Naiad (Angry): Hates the military pollution. Summons water spouts.
(Hazard) Submerged Logs: Tears a hole in the raft. DC 14 Woodcarver's tools to patch.
(Skill) Catch Fish: DC 12 Survival to yield 1d4 Rations while moving.
(Social/Trade) River Merchant: Operates a floating store. Sells potions.
(Combat) Lizardfolk Ambush: Firing blowdarts from the reeds.
(Hazard) Flash Flood: Water level rises rapidly. Camp must be moved immediately.
(Skill) Navigate the Shallows: DC 13 Perception to avoid running aground.
(Combat) Swarm of Poisonous Snakes: Swimming across the river, intercepting the party.
(Social/Trade) Hermit on an Island: Offers cryptic advice about the river's source.
(Combat) Kelpie: Disguised as a drowning horse, tries to pull players under.
(Skill) Purify the Water: DC 14 Medicine/Nature to safely drink from a stagnant eddy.

lake.label: Lake
d20: (Hazard) Sudden Fog: Navigation at Disadvantage. Visibility 10ft.
(Combat) Swarm of Quippers: Frenzy if anyone bleeds near water.
(Skill) Sunken Rowboat: DC 13 Athletics to dive and pry open a locked box.
(Social/Trade) Shoreline Angler: Trades catch (2 Rations) for help reeling a big fish.
(Combat) Merrow Hunting Party: Throw bone-harpoons from deep water.
(Hazard) Whirlpool: Sucks swimmers under. DC 15 Athletics to escape.
(Combat) Water Elemental: Guarding the center of the lake.
(Skill) Ice Fishing (if cold): DC 12 Survival. Yields 1d4 Rations.
(Social/Trade) Lake Nymph: Offers a blessing (Water Breathing for 24h) if the party cleans up trash.
(Combat) Giant Octopus: Grabs players standing too close to the edge.
(Hazard) Toxic Algae Bloom: Water is undrinkable. Drinking causes Poisoned condition.
(Skill) Skip a Stone: Pure flavor. DC 15 DEX. If successful, a Naiad claps from the water.
(Social/Trade) Dredger: Pulling up junk from the bottom. Sells a 'mystery rusted box' for 20gp.
(Combat) Sea Hag: Lurking in the shallows, disguised as floating debris.
(Hazard) Sinking Mud Shore: Halves movement speed for the entire hex.
(Skill) Identify Ruins: DC 14 History. Recognize submerged statues belong to the Sunken Emissary arc.
(Combat) Hydra (Young): 3-headed beast hunting along the shoreline.
(Social/Trade) Noble on a Pleasure Barge: Unaware of the war. Offers wine and fine food.
(Combat) Ghost Ship: A spectral rowboat that attacks the party's mind.
(Skill) Swim the Distance: DC 14 Athletics. Exhausting swim bypasses a land detour.

universal.label: Universal POIs
d20: The Standing Stones: An ancient circle of smooth monoliths. Resting here grants 1d6 Temp HP to all party members for 24 hours.
The Abandoned Campsite: A cold fire ring and a rotting tent. Contains 1d4 abandoned Rations and a bloody, half-burned map showing the adjacent 2 hexes.
The Hermit's Shelter: A small, naturally concealed hollow stocked with dry firewood. Perfect for a safe Long Rest (bypasses the Night Watch hazard roll).
The Rusted Shrine: A forgotten altar to an unnamed deity. Leaving an offering of 1gp or food grants Advantage on that player's next Saving Throw.
The Corpse of the Courier: A skeletal traveler holding a locked, unmarked leather satchel. Contains 50gp, 1 Waterskin, and a vague, undelivered love letter.
The Strange Meteorite: A chunk of glowing, pockmarked star-metal in a small crater. Warm to the touch. Chipped apart and sold to a blacksmith for 150gp.
The Trapped Beast: A mundane local animal caught in a rusted hunter's trap. Freeing it safely (DC 12 Animal Handling) grants the rescuer DM Inspiration.
The Overgrown Statue: A massive, 20-foot-tall bust of an ancient, forgotten king. Its gem-eyes have already been pried out by previous grave robbers.
The Wild Magic Zone: The air smells like ozone and tastes like copper. Any spell of 1st level or higher cast within 100ft automatically triggers a Wild Magic Surge.
The Merchant's Grave: A hastily dug mound with a makeshift wooden marker. Digging it up (dishonorable) yields 20gp and a set of fine, unsoiled clothes.
The Crystal Spring: A tiny fissure of impossibly pure water. Drinking directly cures 1 Level of Exhaustion; it can fill up to 4 Waterskins before running dry.
The Doorway to Nowhere: A freestanding stone doorframe with no walls. Looking through reveals a different biome's landscape. Stepping through does nothing but leaves the player homesick.
The Skirmish Aftermath: A trampled patch littered with broken arrows and shattered shields. DC 13 Investigation yields a single, intact Potion of Healing in the mud.
The Salt Ring: A perfect, unbroken 15-foot circle of salt. Undead and Fiends cannot cross the line, making it an impenetrable campsite against those threats.
The Chained Strongbox: A heavy iron lockbox in thick chains, anchored to the environment. DC 15 Thieves' Tools or DC 18 Athletics. Contains 3d10 silver and a random gem.
The Ranger's Waymark: Subtle carved symbols on a prominent surface. A Scout who passes DC 13 Survival translates it, gaining the exact Biome DC and a warning about the nearby random encounter.
The Anti-Gravity Anomaly: A 30-foot radius sphere where gravity is halved. Jump distances are doubled and heavy packs feel weightless while inside.
The Embedded Blade: A rusted longsword driven deep into stone. DC 16 Athletics to pull free. The sword is mundane, but the triumph grants the puller DM Inspiration.
The Crow Cage: An iron gibbet hanging from a high point, containing bleached bones. A warning to outlaws. Searching the bones yields a hidden silver locket worth 25gp.
The Leyline Nexus: The environment hums with an audible vibration. A spellcaster who meditates here for 10 minutes regains one expended 1st- or 2nd-level spell slot.

wildcards.name: The Deserter's Flight
wildcards.text: Private Jask, bleeding from an arrow wound, a terrified teenager in oversized armor. Give them 4 Rations/Water → reward: exact location of a hidden POI.

wildcards.name: The Corpse Collector
wildcards.trigger: Re-entering a Hex where Combat occurred
wildcards.text: Silas, neutral and emotionless, drives a cart piled with bloody armor. Trade 8 Rations/Water for a 'blind box' chest → 1d4 Gems, 2 Health Potions, random +1 Armor.

wildcards.name: The Wandering Alchemist
wildcards.trigger: Standard Success on a Forage (Food) check
wildcards.text: Fizzlewick the Gnome, covered in soot, backpack clinking, hyperactive. Sell raw ingredients (Bloodroot, Spores) for 3x value, OR pay him to brew potions instantly in the field (Potion of Invisibility / Elixir of Health, no town needed).

wildcards.name: The Lost Courier
wildcards.trigger: Drift Failure on a Navigation Check
wildcards.text: A dying Loyalist Courier. Steal his dispatches or bury him. Stealing grants Advantage on all Navigation checks for 3 days (safe routes known) but triggers 'Hunted' status by the military.

wildcards.name: The Fey-Touched Beast
wildcards.text: A majestic stag with glowing crystal antlers. Do NOT attack — feed it 1 Ration → it cries a single Tear of the Wild (cures any magical disease or curse). If attacked, it teleports away and the camp is cursed with nightmares (automatic exhaustion).
